name: Tex-Mex Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken stock to a boil in a medium-sized saucepan with a cover.
2. Add salt and the rice, then cover and cook over medium heat until done but not mushy, about 15 minutes.
3. Pour the cooking oil into a heavy 10-inch frying pan and heat until hot.
4. Add the rice and stir-fry for 10 minutes.
5. Add the chopped green pepper, onion, and tomato sauce, then stir until well mixed.
6. Cover and continue cooking for 10 more minutes, stirring occasionally.
